# nomad_datacenters (Data Source)



## Example Usage

```terraform
data "nomad_datacenters" "datacenters" {
  prefix            = "prod"
  ignore_down_nodes = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `ignore_down_nodes` (Boolean) If enabled, this flag will ignore nodes that are down when listing datacenters.
- `prefix` (String) Prefix value used for filtering results.

### Read-Only

- `datacenters` (List of String) The list of datacenters.
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
